## Summary

What changed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Factual correction
- [ ] Rating/methodology update
- [ ] New tool
- [ ] Data/schema/script maintenance

## Evidence

Link to the issue, docs, screenshots, or reproduction notes.

## Checklist

- [ ] Ratings use the 0.0–5.0 scale.
- [ ] Feature values are only `yes`, `partial`, `no`, or `na`.
- [ ] The change is scoped to group-generation capability, not unrelated parent-product features.
- [ ] `data/tools.json` and `data/tools.csv` remain consistent.
